news.title:
HSBC keeps Buy on Glenmark, raises TP to Rs 2,600 due to USFDA approval of gFlovent 44mcg inhaler.
Approval boosts US sales; learnings aid gFlovent 110mcg ANDA review with consistent US approvals driving growth.
news.summary:
HSBC keeps Buy on Glenmark, raises TP to Rs 2,600 due to USFDA approval of gFlovent 44mcg inhaler.
Approval boosts US sales; learnings aid gFlovent 110mcg ANDA review with consistent US approvals driving growth.

news.title:
Glenmark gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Aerosol USP 44 mcg with 180-day CGT exclusivity.
The drug is bioequivalent to GSK's FloVent HFA 44 mcg, with US sales of $520.1M annually.
news.summary:
Glenmark gets FDA approval for Fluticasone Propionate Aerosol USP 44 mcg with 180-day CGT exclusivity.
The drug is bioequivalent to GSK's FloVent HFA 44 mcg, with US sales of $520.1M annually.

news.title:
Glenmark USA plans to launch Sodium Phosphates Injection in April 2026.
The injection, bioequivalent to Hospira's drug, targets a $66.8M US market.
news.summary:
Glenmark USA plans to launch Sodium Phosphates Injection in April 2026.
The injection, bioequivalent to Hospira's drug, targets a $66.8M US market.

news.title:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.
They highlighted growth from targeting neglected therapies to leveraging India's epidemiological shift.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma's Dilip Shanghvi and Glenmark's Glenn Saldanha discuss long-term strategies behind building pharma giants.
They highlighted growth from targeting neglected therapies to leveraging India's epidemiological shift.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma projects 23% core margins by FY27, driven by India growth, US launches, and EU expansion.
Company targets debt-free status by March, with disciplined R&D spends and strategic partnerships aiding growth.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma projects 23% core margins by FY27, driven by India growth, US launches, and EU expansion.
Company targets debt-free status by March, with disciplined R&D spends and strategic partnerships aiding growth.

news.title:
Glenmark's Dec 2025 net sales rose 15.1% Y-o-Y to Rs 3,900.6 crore, net profit up 15.9% to Rs 403.2 crore.
EBITDA grew 44.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 914.2 crore; EPS increased to Rs 14.29 from Rs 12.33 in Dec 2024.
news.summary:
Glenmark's Dec 2025 net sales rose 15.1% Y-o-Y to Rs 3,900.6 crore, net profit up 15.9% to Rs 403.2 crore.
EBITDA grew 44.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 914.2 crore; EPS increased to Rs 14.29 from Rs 12.33 in Dec 2024.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma submitted two ANDAs for North America in Q3.
Plans three more ANDAs next quarter, including Flovent 110 and nasal sprays.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma submitted two ANDAs for North America in Q3.
Plans three more ANDAs next quarter, including Flovent 110 and nasal sprays.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma expects strong Q4 FY26 growth from respiratory product launches, including FloVent 44 approval.
Monroe site to start production in Q4, aiming for three annual filings to boost gross margins.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma expects strong Q4 FY26 growth from respiratory product launches, including FloVent 44 approval.
Monroe site to start production in Q4, aiming for three annual filings to boost gross margins.

news.title:
Glenmark expects a strong FY26 finish and a robust start for 'Glenmark 3.0' in 2027.
The company targets a 23% EBITDA margin this year, with significant gains from FY28 via innovations.
news.summary:
Glenmark expects a strong FY26 finish and a robust start for 'Glenmark 3.0' in 2027.
The company targets a 23% EBITDA margin this year, with significant gains from FY28 via innovations.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma targets 115 days net working capital, zero gross debt by Mar '26.
Plans INR 700-800 Cr annual capex; INR 800 Cr next year for expansion, in-licensing.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma targets 115 days net working capital, zero gross debt by Mar '26.
Plans INR 700-800 Cr annual capex; INR 800 Cr next year for expansion, in-licensing.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals uploaded Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
The update complies with SEBI regulations and was shared with NSE and BSE.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals uploaded Q3 FY25-26 earnings call audio on its website.
The update complies with SEBI regulations and was shared with NSE and BSE.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharma faces GST search operations; assures no material financial impact.
Q3 revenue grew 15.1% YoY to ₹3,900.6 crore, EBITDA surged 44.9% to ₹869.7 crore.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharma faces GST search operations; assures no material financial impact.
Q3 revenue grew 15.1% YoY to ₹3,900.6 crore, EBITDA surged 44.9% to ₹869.7 crore.

news.title: Glenmark Pharma's Q3 profit and revenue rose over 15%, driven by growth in India and North America.
news.summary: Glenmark Pharma's Q3 profit and revenue rose over 15%, driven by growth in India and North America.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹39,450.8M and 9M FY26 revenue of ₹1,34,834.61M.
An exceptional legal settlement charge of ₹3,232.32M was recognized; EPS for Q3 FY26 is ₹14.29.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹39,450.8M and 9M FY26 revenue of ₹1,34,834.61M.
An exceptional legal settlement charge of ₹3,232.32M was recognized; EPS for Q3 FY26 is ₹14.29.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals' board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The results highlight revenue, expenses, profit, and exceptional items; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals' board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and 9 months ending Dec 31, 2025.
The results highlight revenue, expenses, profit, and exceptional items; details available on the company's website.

news.title:
Ambuja Cements' Q3 profit falls, while Nestle India and AIA Engineering see profit growth.
Brigade Enterprises' profit declines; updates include NTPC, Bajaj Auto, and Cholamandalam Investment.
news.summary:
Ambuja Cements' Q3 profit falls, while Nestle India and AIA Engineering see profit growth.
Brigade Enterprises' profit declines; updates include NTPC, Bajaj Auto, and Cholamandalam Investment.

news.title:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.
news.summary:
Indian pharma firms are expected to see 8-9% revenue growth in Q3FY26, led by domestic demand and select speciality portfolios.
Lupin is poised to outperform peers, while Ajanta Pharma and Eris Lifesciences lead with double-digit growth due to strong domestic execution.

news.title:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals' board to meet on Jan 30, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9M FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Dec 31, 2025, to Feb 1, 2026, per SEBI insider trading regulations.
news.summary:
Glenmark Pharmaceuticals' board to meet on Jan 30, 2026, to approve Q3 and 9M FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window closed from Dec 31, 2025, to Feb 1, 2026, per SEBI insider trading regulations.

news.title:
Indian firms like ONGC Videsh, IOC, and Reliance face geopolitical risks due to Venezuela turmoil, impacting oil projects and investments.
Pharma firms like Sun Pharma, Glenmark, and Cipla, along with Jindal Steel's mining ties, face operational and financial uncertainties.
news.summary:
Indian firms like ONGC Videsh, IOC, and Reliance face geopolitical risks due to Venezuela turmoil, impacting oil projects and investments.
Pharma firms like Sun Pharma, Glenmark, and Cipla, along with Jindal Steel's mining ties, face operational and financial uncertainties.

news.title:
Glenmark launches Epinephrine Injection USP in the USA, bioequivalent to BPI Labs' version.
The product targets institutions, addressing a $67.6M annual US market, focusing on affordability.
news.summary:
Glenmark launches Epinephrine Injection USP in the USA, bioequivalent to BPI Labs' version.
The product targets institutions, addressing a $67.6M annual US market, focusing on affordability.
